title: Pumpkin Spice Candle - 9.7 oz /275g Pumpkin Candle in Orange Frosted Glass Jar with Wooden Lid and Wooden Crackling Wick in Luxurious Gift Box - Cosy, Warm and Comforting
features: FESTIVE FRAGRANCE: Engage yourself in the comforting scent of pumpkin spice, a delightful blend of cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and ginger, evoking feelings of warmth and nostalgia. Whether it's a crisp autumn evening or a snowy winter night, this candle fills your space with the essence of cozy gatherings and seasonal joy.

GENEROUS SIZE: With a substantial 9.7 oz (275g) capacity, this candle offers hours of indulgence, allowing you to savor its delightful fragrance for extended periods. Whether you're enjoying a quiet evening alone or hosting a gathering with friends, this candle ensures that your space is enveloped in its inviting aroma.

ELEGANT PRESENTATION: Adorned in an exquisite orange frosted glass jar, this candle not only fills your space with fragrance but also adds a touch of sophistication to your décor. The frosted finish diffuses light beautifully, creating a soft, ambient glow that enhances the cozy atmosphere of any room.

NATURAL WOODEN LID: Designed with a rustic wooden lid, this candle looks stylish and helps preserve its fragrance when not in use. The lid seals the candle securely, preventing scent loss and ensuring each burn is as aromatic as the first. Additionally, it adds a touch of rustic charm to your space.

LUXURIOUS GIFT BOX: Packaged in a beautifully crafted gift box, this candle makes a thoughtful and elegant present for loved ones. Whether it's for a birthday, holiday, or special occasion, the luxurious presentation adds an extra touch of sophistication to your gift-giving.
description: Product description Pumpkin Spice Scented Candle: Create a Cozy Haven: Modify your space into a haven of warmth and comfort with the inviting aroma of pumpkin spice candles. Whether you're curling up with a book, enjoying a romantic dinner, or simply unwinding after a long day, this candle sets the perfect mood for relaxation and rejuvenation. Crafted with Care: Our candle is made using high-quality ingredients, ensuring a clean and even burn. Each ingredient is thoughtfully selected to deliver a superior candle experience, from the wax to the fragrance. Long-Lasting Enjoyment: Designed for longevity, our candle offers hours of aromatic bliss with each burn. Whether you're using it for daily relaxation or special occasions, you can trust that this candle will provide consistent fragrance and performance from start to finish. Versatile Addition to Any Space: Suitable for a variety of settings and occasions, our candle adds a touch of luxury to any space. Whether it's placed on a bedside table, mantelpiece, or dining table, it serves as a versatile home decor piece that enhances the ambiance of any room. Sustainable Luxury: Made with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices, our candle allows you to indulge in luxury guilt-free. From the responsibly sourced wooden wick to the recyclable glass jar, every aspect of this candle is designed with sustainability in mind. Enhance Your Decor: Improve your home decor with the vibrant orange hue of our candle's glass jar. Whether it's displayed on its own or as part of a decorative arrangement, its striking color adds a pop of warmth and vitality to any room, complementing a wide range of interior styles. Don't miss the opportunity to enhance your home decor and embrace the essence of autumn. Order yours now and experience the warmth and comfort it brings. Safety Warning Always keep candles within sight. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep candles away from flammable materials. Ensure the candle wick is trimmed to 1/4 inch before each burn. Dispose of candle remnants properly. Monitor burn time to avoid overheating. Do not move a burning candle. Follow these guidelines to ensure safe and enjoyable candle usage.
